articles.title: When Should You Use AI? The Answer Might Surprise You!
articles.summary: A new study shows that using AI later, after you've tried solving a problem yourself, can actually boost your critical thinking. But if you're in a hurry, using AI early helps.

articles.title: Scientists Find a Way to Restore Memory in Mice with Alzheimer's
articles.summary: By blocking a single protein called PTP1B, scientists improved memory in mice with Alzheimer's. This could lead to new treatments for the disease that affects millions of people.

articles.title: Your Everyday Moves Could Be Training Robots!
articles.summary: Robotics companies are paying people to film themselves doing simple tasks like microwaving food. This data helps train humanoid robots to move like humans.
